description_long: This traffic barricade is a portable, A-frame style barrier commonly used for roadwork or construction zones. It features a rectangular top panel with bold, diagonal orange and white reflective stripes, designed to enhance visibility and warn drivers or pedestrians. The frame is constructed from a sturdy, light-colored material, likely plastic or composite, with two wide legs on each side for stability. The lower section of the barricade shows some dirt and scuff marks, indicating outdoor use. There are no visible lights or electronic components, but a handle slot is present at the top for easy lifting and transport. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing visibility, portability, and ease of deployment in urban environments.
description: A portable A-frame traffic barricade with orange and white diagonal stripes, made of light-colored plastic and designed for high visibility and stability.
description_view_0: Side view showing the A-frame structure and the handle slot at the top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the orange and white diagonal striped panel and the two wide support legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the A-frame structure and handle slot.
description_view_3: Rear view with the striped panel visible, similar to the front but with more visible scuff marks on the lower section.
attribute_reflective_striping_pattern: Diagonal orange and white stripes, medium width, repeating across the top panel.
